ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "priority_score" REAL /* Score assigned to the district based on healthcare metrics */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Key contact person for the district */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the key contact */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the district's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistics entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Count of deceased individuals */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Count of active cases */,
  "recovered" REAL /* Count of recovered individuals */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were reported */,
  "vaccinated" INTEGER /* Count of vaccinated individuals */,
  "tested" INTEGER /* Count of individuals tested */,
  "hospitalized" INTEGER /* Count of hospitalized individuals */,
  "icu" INTEGER /* Count of individuals in intensive care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease type */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "incubation_period" REAL /* Average incubation period in days */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Transmission rate of the disease */,
  "fatality_rate" REAL /* Fatality rate of the disease */,
  "prevention_advice" TEXT /* General advice for preventing the disease */,
  "treatment_advice" TEXT /* General advice for treating the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district receiving the resources */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., medical supplies, staff) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource allocated */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the resource */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the resource (if applicable) */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
